description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear. The simple design is complemented with colourful straps and is perfect when teamed with casuals.UpperColourful leather straps covering the midfoot and forefoot gives a snug Fit and great eye appealSoft lining for added styleFabric lined footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleWedge heel for ergonomic comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
